headline: 24/7 Emergency Home Repairs
subheading: Licensed pros ready to fix your HVAC, plumbing, electrical or roofing issues—same day service guaranteed.
description: HomeFix Pro connects you with vetted, licensed contractors for emergency home repairs with transparent pricing and 100% satisfaction guarantee.
product_pitch: No more waiting days for repairs—we'll have a pro at your door in hours
seo_title: Emergency Home Repair Services | HVAC, Plumbing, Electrical & Roofing
seo_description: 24/7 emergency home repair services. Licensed pros for HVAC, plumbing, electrical and roofing issues. Same day service guaranteed.

pain_points: Wasting hours making flashcards that don't actually help you retain information
Not knowing which concepts to focus on before big exams
Forgetting 80% of what you studied within 48 hours
benefits: Transparent pricing with no hidden fees

features.title: 24/7 Emergency Service
features.description: We're available nights, weekends and holidays when you need help most.

features.title: Licensed Professionals
features.description: Every technician is licensed, insured and background-checked for your safety.

features.title: Price Match Guarantee
features.description: We'll match any licensed competitor's written estimate for the same services.

social_proof.name: Michelle R.
social_proof.quote: Had a burst pipe at 2am on a Sunday. HomeFix Pro had a plumber at my door in 90 minutes. Lifesavers!

social_proof.name: James L.
social_proof.quote: We use HomeFix Pro for all our emergency repairs. Their response time beats anyone in the area.

social_proof.name: Sarah K.
social_proof.quote: AC went out during a heatwave. They had it fixed same day when others said 3-day wait. Worth every penny.

faq.question: What areas do you serve?
faq.answer: We cover all major metro areas with 24/7 availability. Call to confirm service in your neighborhood.

faq.question: Do you charge for estimates?
faq.answer: Diagnostic fees apply but are waived if you proceed with our recommended repairs.

faq.question: What payment methods do you accept?
faq.answer: All major credit cards, checks, and we offer financing options for major repairs.

page_content.urgency_text: Don't wait—emergencies get worse with time. Call now for same-day service.

lead_capture.headline: Need urgent repairs?
lead_capture.description: Tell us about your issue and we'll dispatch a pro immediately.
